log: === INITIATIVE ===
Young Red Dragon: 20 (d20:20 + 0)
Aarakocra — Bardic Musician: 5 (d20:3 + 2)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: 50/67
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: 33/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS!
⚡ Aarakocra — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:14 total 24 vs AC 14 — still hits.
--- Aarakocra — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Aarakocra — Bardic Musician casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
Aarakocra — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Aarakocra — Bardic Musician for 9. HP: 42/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Aarakocra — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Aarakocra — Bardic Musician casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 12 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Aarakocra — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Aarakocra — Bardic Musician for 8. HP: 50/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: 27/67
→ Concentration save: [20 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS!
--- Aarakocra — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Aarakocra — Bardic Musician casts Vicious Mockery
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon gains: vm_disadvantage
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: 5/67
→ Aarakocra — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
